label: Robotaxi / autonomous mobility

capacity.note: Fleet scale, city permits, and HD mapping capacity; slow geographic rollout.

pricing.note: Unit economics vs ride-hail and private car TCO still contested.

regulatory.note: City/state AV approvals are the binding interference gate.

scope_note: Horizon industry: public arrival-date quotes plus checklist. No hold-book KPI bind yet. Context only.
